title: Normalize SDLC lineage and serve a safe read-only API
acceptance: Canonical KB records normalize into a stable versioned observatory view model with explicit recorded, inferred, missing, and malformed provenance.
Read-only loopback endpoints expose overview, stories, contracts, changes, verification, and source records without path traversal or symlink escape.
Empty, partial, legacy, and malformed .sdlc states return bounded diagnostics and never invent historical facts.
Core normalization and security invariants have deterministic Node tests.
